name: Fresh Peach Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. For crust #1: Mix all ingredients together and press into a 9-inch pie pan. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes at 325°F. Cool.
2. OR use crust 2. For crust #2: Mix all ingredients together and press into a 10-inch pie pan or a large deep dish pie plate. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F. Cool.
3. Filling: Boil water, corn syrup, salt, and cornstarch until thickened. Remove from heat and add peach jello. Cool in the refrigerator.
4. Peel and slice peaches. Add to the cooled filling and pour into the crust.
5. Garnish with Whipped Cream or Cool Whip.
